languages.text: "Устать не успел. Только вот сменил Изимонда. Того, что соглядатаем к нам приставлен, а сам форму по уставу беречь не может. Перепачкался давеча весь, пока волок вражьи трупы".

traits.locale_text: "Устать не успел. Только вот сменил Изимонда. Того, что соглядатаем к нам приставлен, а сам форму по уставу беречь не может. Перепачкался давеча весь, пока волок вражьи трупы".

languages.text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."
languages.original_text: "Устать не успел. Только вот сменил Изимонда. Того, что соглядатаем к нам приставлен, а сам форму по уставу беречь не может. Перепачкался давеча весь, пока волок вражьи трупы".

traits.locale_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

"Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

"Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

languages.text: “还好，没多久，至少还没开始倦怠。我才刚接替苏尔贝克。那家伙本来是被派来监视我们的，结果自己连着装规范都遵守不了。前两天他拖敌人尸体，把自己弄得脏兮兮的。”
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: “还好，没多久，至少还没开始倦怠。我才刚接替苏尔贝克。那家伙本来是被派来监视我们的，结果自己连着装规范都遵守不了。前两天他拖敌人尸体，把自己弄得脏兮兮的。”

languages.text: « Pas assez pour être fatigué. Je viens juste de relever Sauerback, celui qui est chargé de nous surveiller, mais qu'est même pas capable de porter l'uniforme réglementaire. Il s'est mis dans un sale état l'autre jour, en transportant les cadavres des ennemis. »
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: « Pas assez pour être fatigué. Je viens juste de relever Sauerback, celui qui est chargé de nous surveiller, mais qu'est même pas capable de porter l'uniforme réglementaire. Il s'est mis dans un sale état l'autre jour, en transportant les cadavres des ennemis. »

languages.text: "Yorulacak kadar uzun değil. Az önce Sauerback'i azlettim. Hepimize göz kulak olması için görevlendirilmişti ama üniforma yönetmeliklerine bile uyamıyordu. Geçen gün düşman cesetlerini sürüklerken her yanını batırmış."
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: "Yorulacak kadar uzun değil. Az önce Sauerback'i azlettim. Hepimize göz kulak olması için görevlendirilmişti ama üniforma yönetmeliklerine bile uyamıyordu. Geçen gün düşman cesetlerini sürüklerken her yanını batırmış."

languages.text: «No lo suficiente para estar cansado. Acabo de relevar a Sauerback; ese que tiene asignado vigilarnos y es incapaz de seguir las regulaciones de vestimenta siquiera. El otro día se cubrió de porquería arrastrando cadáveres enemigos».
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: «No lo suficiente para estar cansado. Acabo de relevar a Sauerback; ese que tiene asignado vigilarnos y es incapaz de seguir las regulaciones de vestimenta siquiera. El otro día se cubrió de porquería arrastrando cadáveres enemigos».

languages.text: "Nicht lange genug, um müde zu sein. Ich habe Sauerback gerade erst abgelöst. Er soll uns alle im Auge behalten, kann aber nicht mal die Uniformbestimmungen einhalten. Er war neulich nach der Beseitigung einiger feindlicher Leichen total verdreckt."
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht lange genug, um müde zu sein. Ich habe Sauerback gerade erst abgelöst. Er soll uns alle im Auge behalten, kann aber nicht mal die Uniformbestimmungen einhalten. Er war neulich nach der Beseitigung einiger feindlicher Leichen total verdreckt."

languages.text: 「疲れるほどではない。私はちょうどサウアーバックから交代したばかりだ。敵の遺体を引いて汚れた男だ。全員の監視を任されたはずなのに、制服規定すら守れない男だ。」
languages.original_text: "Not long enough to be tired. I only just relieved Sauerback. The one who's been assigned to keep an eye on us all, but who can't even follow the uniform regulations. He got himself all dirty the other day dragging enemy corpses."

traits.locale_text: 「疲れるほどではない。私はちょうどサウアーバックから交代したばかりだ。敵の遺体を引いて汚れた男だ。全員の監視を任されたはずなのに、制服規定すら守れない男だ。」
